data.title: Key Fed Inflation Rate Makes Rate Cut A Lock; S&P 500 Rallies
data.description: The current inflation rate is lower than what the Federal Reserve had predicted. This has increased the likelihood of a rate cut by the Fed. As a result, the S&P 500 experienced a significant rally following this news.

data.title: ADP Jobs Report Shows Surprise Drop In Private Payrolls; S&P 500 Wavers
data.description: The BLS jobs report will be released after the upcoming Fed meeting. The recent ADP Jobs Report revealed an unexpected decrease in private payrolls. This led to fluctuations in the S&P 500 index. The official report by ADP marked a significant decline in job numbers, causing concern in the market. Investors are awaiting the Federal Reserve's decision in light of this data. The specifics of the job market changes will be clearer when the BLS report is made public following the upcoming meeting.

data.title: Luraco Medical Massage Chairs Officially Licensed and Accredited as Durable Medical Equipment (DME)
data.description: In Arlington, Texas, on March 13, 2026, Luraco Health & Beauty LLC, the primary U.S. manufacturer of Medical Massage Chairs, revealed that their medical massage chair technology has received accreditation as Durable Medical Equipment (DME). This acknowledgment solidifies the company's position as a top provider in the industry.

data.title: Oil prices surged by 11% for the week despite efforts to increase supplies; Trump waived sanctions on Russian crude.
data.description: Following a 10% increase on Thursday, oil prices showed minimal response to President Trump's choice to exempt sanctions on the trade of certain Russian crude.

data.title: Letting Home Sellers Test the Waters Before Listing Could Boost Housing Supply as Much as 12%
data.description: In Seattle, Redfin economists predict a potential boost of 6%-12% in annual housing inventory levels, particularly in markets allowing home sellers to experiment with pricing strategies through 'Private Exclusive' and 'Coming Soon' listings before officially listing their properties. This insight comes from a recent report by Redfin, the real estate agency partnered with Rocket. Redfin's Senior Economist Asad Khan highlighted the uniqueness of each home as a factor contributing to this trend.

data.title: WeShop Launches “For Mums Everywhere” £500 Mother’s Day Holiday Competition to Celebrate the Women Who Raised Us
data.description: WeShop is rolling out a competition named "For Mums Everywhere," offering a £500 Mother's Day holiday prize to honor the special women who raised us. This initiative aims to celebrate the selfless dedication of mothers and show appreciation for their hard work and love. The competition encourages participants to nominate deserving mothers for a chance to win the £500 holiday reward. The competition is part of WeShop's ongoing efforts to recognize the invaluable role of mothers in our lives and express gratitude for their contributions.
